content.cn_text: [旁白]: 您将听到一名男子和一名自行车租赁店店员之间的电话对话。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You will hear a telephone conversation between a man and a bicycle rental shop assistant.

content.cn_text: 现在请看问题一到十并回答所有这些问题。
content.en_text: Now look at the questions one to ten and answer all these questions.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 您好，快骑自行车租赁。我是莫莉。今天我能为您提供什么帮助？
content.en_text: [Molly]: Hello, fast cycle rentals. This is Molly speaking. How can I assist you today?

content.cn_text: [女士]: 嗨，莫莉，我打算周末在城市里逛逛，觉得租辆自行车
content.en_text: [Woman]: Hi Molly, I'm planning to explore the city over the weekend and thought renting a bike

content.cn_text: 会很方便。您能告诉我都有哪些选择吗？
content.en_text: would be convenient. Could you tell me what options you have?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 当然。对于休闲城市骑行，我们通常推荐经典自行车。
content.en_text: [Molly]: Absolutely. For casual city rides we usually recommend the classic bicycle.

content.cn_text: 这是一款基本车型，轻便且在平坦路面上骑行轻松。
content.en_text: It's a basic model, lightweight and easy to pedal on flat surfaces.

content.cn_text: 除非您要应对山丘或崎岖地形，否则您不需要山地车或混合车。
content.en_text: Unless you're tackling hills or rough terrain, you won't need a mountain or hybrid bike.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 不，我就在主干道和小路上骑。经典款听起来不错。
content.en_text: [Woman]: No, I'll just be sticking to the main roads and paths. The classic one sounds fine.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 太好了。您真幸运。我们目前有促销优惠。
content.en_text: [Molly]: Perfect. You're in luck. We currently have a promotional offer.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 租金为每天52英镑，这比我们通常的65英镑有所降低。
content.en_text: The rental fee is £52 for the day, which is a reduction from our usual rate of 65.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 这很合理。我需要交押金之类的吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: That's reasonable. Do I need to leave a deposit or anything like that?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 是的，我们需要40英镑的押金。只要自行车完好无损地归还，押金将全额退还。
content.en_text: [Molly]: Yes, we do require a £40 deposit. It's fully refundable as long as the bike comes back undamaged.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 所以您需要预付92英镑，但其中40英镑在您归还时会退还。
content.en_text: So you'd be paying £92 up front, but 40 of that comes back when you return it.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 明白了。那这个价格都包含什么？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Got it. And what's included in that price?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 嗯，好几样。首先，我们提供涵盖损坏的保险，
content.en_text: [Molly]: Well, several things. First of all, we offer insurance that covers damage,

content.cn_text: 这样如果车架被刮伤或齿轮轻微弯曲，您就会受到保护。
content.en_text: so you're protected if the frame gets scratched or the gears get slightly bent.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 不过，这不适用于盗窃或重大事故。只适用于轻微磨损。
content.en_text: That won't apply to theft or major accidents, though. Only minor wear and tear.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 知道了，这很好。有没有包含安全设备？
content.en_text: [Woman]: That's good to know. Is any safety equipment included?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 头盔不包含在标准套餐中，但如果需要，您可以花7英镑租一个。
content.en_text: [Molly]: A helmet isn't part of the standard package, but you can rent one for £7 if needed.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 这不是强制性的，但为了您的安全，我们推荐您佩戴，特别是在交通繁忙的地方骑行时。
content.en_text: It's not mandatory, but we recommend it for your own safety, especially if you're riding in traffic.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 好的。为了安全起见，我可能会租一个。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Right. I'll probably get one just to be safe.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 作为租赁的一部分，我们会给您一张城市地图，上面标有所有适合骑行的街道
content.en_text: [Molly]: As part of the rental, we'll give you a city map, which marks all the cycle-friendly streets

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 和风景优美的路线。此外，自行车将配备前后车灯。
content.en_text: and scenic routes. Also, the bike will come with lights at both the front and rear.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 如果您打算晚上骑行，这非常重要。
content.en_text: Very important if you're planning to ride in the evening.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 这很有帮助。万一出问题，你们有修理用的东西吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: That's very helpful. Do you have anything for repairs in case something goes wrong?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 是的，我们确实提供一个可选的维修工具包。它是一个小袋子，里面有基本工具，
content.en_text: [Molly]: Yes, we do offer an optional repair kit. It's a small pouch with basic tools,

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 一个迷你打气筒、补胎片和扳手，我们只租3英镑。
content.en_text: a mini-pump, tire patches and a spanner, and we rent it out for just £3.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 如果您在市中心以外骑行，它会特别有用。
content.en_text: It's particularly useful if you're riding outside the city centre.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 我也租一个，以防万一。你们有没有为回头客提供任何形式的忠诚计划或优惠？
content.en_text: [Woman]: I'll take that too, just in case. Do you offer any kind of loyalty scheme or return customer benefit?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 实际上，是的。如果您再次向我们租赁，我们会在您未来的租金上给予折扣。
content.en_text: [Molly]: Actually, yes. If you rent from us again, we'll apply a reduction on your future hire.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 我们非常重视回头客。
content.en_text: We really value returning clients.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 这是个很好的激励。另外，你们明天几点关门？
content.en_text: [Woman]: That's a great incentive. Also, what time do you close tomorrow?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 通常，我们下午5点半关门，但明天我们会延长营业时间，到
content.en_text: [Molly]: Normally, we shut the shop at 5.30, but tomorrow we'll be extending our hours and closing at

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 6点15分关门。由于当地的周末市场，我们预计会有更多的游客。
content.en_text: 6.15 instead. We're expecting more visitors due to the local weekend market.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 太好了。我争取在那之前过来。你们的地址是什么？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Great. I'll try to come by before that. And what's your address?

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 好的。我们在克利夫顿街28号。拼写是C-L-I-F-F-T-O-N。
content.en_text: [Molly]: Sure. We're at number 28 Cliffton Street. That's spelled C-L-I-F-F-T-O-N.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 就在主广场旁边，邮局隔壁。您肯定不会错过。
content.en_text: It's just off the main square right next to the post office. You can't miss it.

content.cn_text: [女士]: 太好了。非常感谢您提供的信息，莫莉。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Perfect. Thanks so much for all the info, Molly.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 没问题。您来的时候我们会把一切都准备好的。
content.en_text: [Molly]: No problem at all. We'll have everything ready when you arrive.

content.cn_text: [莫莉]: 回头见。
content.en_text: See you soon.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 您
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You

groups.title: Questions 1-10.

items.title: The shop has a 8. __________ for repeat customers
